meta.name: Usage Anomaly Detector
meta.description: Monitor daily usage metrics, detect anomalies vs. rolling baseline, and alert when metrics deviate beyond configured thresholds.

parameters.content:
## 27 — Usage Anomaly Detector

**Required:**
- USAGE_SHEET_ID: columns date, metric_name, value
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO
- ANOMALY_STDDEV_THRESHOLD: number of standard deviations to flag (default: 2)

**Rolling baseline:** 14-day window
**Schedule:** Daily at 06:00
**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: 🚨 Usage Anomaly {{ $json.date }}: {{ $json.anomaly_count }} metric(s) flagged
